message:
feat: add menu icons, paste selection, and select all

- Add icons to all menu items (using Unicode symbols)
- Add "Paste Selection" (⌘⇧V) menu item and shortcut
- Add "Select All" (⌘A) menu item and shortcut
- Fix shortcut alignment to right side of menu items
- Reduce mobile title bar height (smaller hamburger)
- Improve mobile menu icon sizes
